name: experiment-agent
description: Experiment Agent — execute, monitor, interpret, and verify experiments for academic research.

plugins.name: experiment-agent
plugins.description: 1 skill, 4 modes: run (code execution + monitoring), manage (human study tracking), validate (statistical interpretation + 11-type fallacy scan), plan (Socratic experiment design). Integrates with ARS pipeline between Stage 1 and Stage 2.
